answers: Grief stages (Kubler-Ross): denial, anger, bargaining, depression, acceptance. Not everyone goes through all stages linearly.
Coping: allow yourself to feel, talk to someone, maintain routines, take care of your health, and be patient.
Tips: there's no right way to grieve, grief has no timeline, and seeking professional help is strength not weakness.
Shok er sathe deal: nijer feel ta ke accept koro, karo sathe kotha bolo, nij er jotno nao, ar shomoy dao.
